name: Water Heater Calculator
seo_description: Electric Water Heater Calculator. Tank capacity, Inlet temperature (°C), Outlet temperature (°C) — get Required power, Energy per cycle, Monthly.
example_label: Calculatete power for a water heater: 200L from 15C to 60C in 60 minutes.

range_hints.temp_entrada_c: Temperatura of the water of red (varía per estación)
range_hints.temp_salida_c: Temperatura of uso: 45-50°C ducha, 60°C for legionela
range_hints.horas_calentamiento: Tiempo deseado for calentar the tank completo

result_context: To calentar {litros_deposito}L of {temp_entrada_c}°C a {temp_salida_c}°C in {horas_calentamiento}h needs power of {power_kw} kW ({power_w} W). energy requerida: {energia_kwh} kWh.
formula_display: Î”T = T_salida - T_entrada; energy = liters × Î”T × 0.00116; power = energy ÷ hours
steps: Add margin: 10.5 kW x 1.2 = 12.6 kW (commercial: 13 kW)
mistakes: Not considering inlet water temperature (lower in winter = more power)
Undersizing for simultaneous hot water draws
Not accounting for heat loss through tank walls
